package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for request_context_value_extraction_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated current-user, tenant, locale, or auth extraction logic.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule139NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule139NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule139NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario139Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule139NegativeService, input Rule139NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
